best.name: teleological_threshold
best.conjecture: Avoidance correlates with q/k > threshold. Separation: 5.15 vs 1.33

best.name: monotonicity_compression_ratio
best.definition: log2(C_monotone) / log2(C_free) — effective dimension under monotonicity

best.name: spectral_defect_per_orbit
best.conjecture: Spectral defect per orbit decreases as k grows, but N₀ defect concentrates on orbit containing 0

best.name: orthogonality_weighted_contraction
best.conjecture: This quantity is bounded below by a positive constant for all k

best.name: residue_deficit_rate
best.definition: 1 - (#{residues hit mod p} / p) for smallest prime p
best.conjecture: Deficit rate is positive for all k (residue 0 is always missed)
